nodes.title: Debounce search work
nodes.why: The stream waits for a short pause so rapid keystrokes do not trigger a search for every input event.
nodes.alternative: Run the filter and delayed result pipeline immediately for every keypress.
nodes.tradeoff: Debouncing reduces churn but intentionally delays visible suggestions.

nodes.title: Keep only the latest query stream

anchor.snippet: switchMap((q: string) => (q ? this.search(q) : of([] as string[])))

nodes.why: switchMap discards stale delayed searches when a newer query arrives.
nodes.alternative: Merge every pending search and allow older results to arrive after newer input.
nodes.tradeoff: Previous work is abandoned, which is correct for autocomplete but not for operations that must all complete.

nodes.title: Navigate the currently rendered options
nodes.why: Keyboard movement uses the actual option count after filtering and empty-state changes.
nodes.alternative: Navigate against the full city dataset regardless of what is rendered.
nodes.tradeoff: DOM lookup couples navigation to rendered roles, but it keeps activeIndex inside the visible list.

nodes.title: Close when interaction leaves the component
nodes.why: The document listener dismisses suggestions without closing when the click remains inside the autocomplete.
nodes.alternative: Close on every document mousedown, including option selection.
nodes.tradeoff: Containment checking adds DOM awareness, but it preserves mouse selection behavior.

nodes.title: Escape text before adding highlight markup
nodes.why: Suggestion text is escaped before a mark element is introduced, preventing source strings from becoming executable HTML.
nodes.alternative: Interpolate raw suggestion text into an innerHTML highlight string.
nodes.tradeoff: Manual escaping adds code, but it keeps highlighted output safe.
